title: Alchemancy X Cobblemon Compat
description: Adds Alchemancy dormant properties and recipes for Cobblemon
body:
Most Cobblemon items now have dormant properties, there are so many properties attached to so many items that listing them here would take too long, check them out in-game!

This datapack also add recipes for, all Exp. Candys except XS, ability capsules/patches, the eject button/pack, the master ball, origin ball, and cherish ball
